assertions.text: Detects React as the web framework variant
assertions.evidence: Title says 'CleverTap React Integration Guide', React-specific patterns throughout.
Baseline run has no access to the skill or core reference files.
Uses useEffect in usePageTracking custom hook for route-change tracking.
Shows clevertap.onUserLogin.push({ Site: { ... } }) in Signup.js handleSignup.

assertions.text: Includes event.push for page view tracking
assertions.evidence: Uses clevertap.event.push('Page Viewed', {...}) in usePageTracking hook.
